hero.title: SPSC RED CRESCENT
hero.subtitle: SENA PUBLIC SCHOOL AND COLLEGE RED CRESCENT SOCIETY

about:
SPSC Red Crescent Society (SPSCRCS) is a newly established student volunteer initiative dedicated to humanity, leadership, community service, teamwork, first-aid awareness, and positive social impact.

We aim to assist in emergency preparedness and foster a lifelong spirit of volunteerism and responsible citizenship among active youth.

whyJoin.title: Serve Humanity
whyJoin.description: Engage in direct community welfare activities and stand beside those in times of critical need.

whyJoin.title: Learn First Aid
whyJoin.description: Acquire certified emergency response and life-saving first aid skills that prepare you for real-world scenarios.

whyJoin.title: Create Social Impact
whyJoin.description: Lead and participate in environmental cleaning campaigns, health awareness drives, and humanitarian aid.

whyJoin.title: Build Leadership
whyJoin.description: Take responsibility for managing volunteer units, organizing massive-scale events, and speaking publicly.

whyJoin.title: Grow With Teamwork
whyJoin.description: Join a group of passionate peers, build lasting friendships, and learn how to collaborate effectively.

whyJoin.title: Develop Future Skills
whyJoin.description: Develop critical communication, organizational, emergency planning, and career-boosting soft skills.

activities.title: Community Service
activities.description: Actively participating in cleanup, distribution, and local school support programs.

activities.title: Volunteer Training
activities.description: Comprehensive workshops preparing students to handle volunteer operations and emergency response.

activities.title: First Aid Awareness
activities.description: Teaching core medical, rescue guidance, and disaster safety standards within our campus.

activities.title: Blood Donation Support
activities.description: Coordinating and boosting awareness for safe blood donation sessions to support hospitals.

activities.title: Youth Development
activities.description: Fostering active student leaders who manage clubs, command respect, and act as role models.

gmailSubject: Sena College Red Crescent Admission Status
gmailBody:
Dear {applicant_name},

We are pleased to inform you that your registration for the Sena Public School & College Red Crescent Youth unit (Student ID: {student_id}) has been processed.

Status: {status}

Thank you for your enthusiasm to serve, learn, and lead with us!

SPSC Red Crescent Youth Unit
